mapper.select: select p.post_id as postId, m.name as authorName, m.nickname as authorNickname, p.content as text, p.created_at as createdAt from post_tbl p join members m on p.member_id = m.member_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and ( lower(p.content) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') or lower(m.name) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') or lower(m.nickname) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') ) order by p.created_at desc limit 50

select m.member_id as memberId, m.name, m.nickname, m.email, m.profile_image_url as profileImageUrl, CASE WHEN f.follower_member_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END as following from members m left join follow_tbl f on f.follower_member_id = #{loginId} and f.following_member_id = m.member_id where lower(m.name) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') or lower(m.nickname) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') or lower(m.email) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') order by m.name asc limit 50

select h.hashtag_id as hashtagId, h.hashtag, count(ph.post_hashtag_id) as postCount from hashtag h left join post_hashtag ph on h.hashtag_id = ph.hashtag_id where lower(h.hashtag) like concat('%', lower(#{query}), '%') group by h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag order by postCount desc limit 50

choose.when: select h.hashtag_id as hashtagId, h.hashtag, h.use_count as useCount from hashtag h order by h.use_count desc, h.hashtag asc limit #{limit}
choose.otherwise: select h.hashtag_id as hashtagId, h.hashtag, count(ph.post_hashtag_id) as useCount from hashtag h join post_hashtag ph on h.hashtag_id = ph.hashtag_id join post_tbl p on p.post_id = ph.post_id where p.deleted_yn = 'N' and p.created_at >= #{from} group by h.hashtag_id, h.hashtag order by useCount desc, h.hashtag asc limit #{limit}
